allow: Bash(node -e "const {BigQuery}=require\('@google-cloud/bigquery'\); const bq=new BigQuery\({projectId:'project-a27c9cde-2ce6-4d40-9b9'}\); bq.query\({query:'SELECT 1 AS ok', maximumBytesBilled:'10000000'}\).then\(\([r]\)=>console.log\('AUTH OK ->', JSON.stringify\(r\)\)\).catch\(e=>console.log\('ERR ->', e.message.split\('\\n'\)[0]\)\)")

PowerShell($p = "c:\\Users\\USER\\Desktop\\Hackathon\\Authority Dashboard\\key.json"; if \(Test-Path $p\) { try { $j = Get-Content $p -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Host "key.json: VALID JSON"; Write-Host \("client_email: " + $j.client_email\); Write-Host \("project_id: " + $j.project_id\); Write-Host \("has private_key: " + [bool]$j.private_key\) } catch { Write-Host "key.json present but NOT valid JSON" } } else { Write-Host "key.json NOT found in root" })

PowerShell($keyPath = "c:\\Users\\USER\\Desktop\\Hackathon\\Authority Dashboard\\key.json"; $envPath = "c:\\Users\\USER\\Desktop\\Hackathon\\Authority Dashboard\\.env.local"; $key = \(Get-Content $keyPath -Raw\) -replace "`r","" -replace "`n",""; \(Get-Content $envPath | Where-Object { $_ -notmatch '^GCP_SA_KEY=' }\) + "GCP_SA_KEY=$key" | Set-Content $envPath -Encoding utf8; Write-Host "GCP_SA_KEY written. Lines in .env.local:"; \(Get-Content $envPath | ForEach-Object { if \($_ -match '^GCP_SA_KEY='\) { 'GCP_SA_KEY=<' + \($_.Length - 11\) + ' chars hidden>' } else { \($_ -split '='\)[0] + '=...' } }\))

PowerShell($paths = @\("$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Google\\Cloud SDK\\google-cloud-sdk\\bin\\gcloud.cmd","$env:APPDATA\\..\\Local\\Google\\Cloud SDK\\google-cloud-sdk\\bin\\gcloud.cmd","C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\Google\\Cloud SDK\\google-cloud-sdk\\bin\\gcloud.cmd","C:\\Program Files\\Google\\Cloud SDK\\google-cloud-sdk\\bin\\gcloud.cmd"\); $found = $paths | Where-Object { Test-Path $_ } | Select-Object -First 1; if \($found\) { Write-Host "FOUND: $found" } else { Write-Host "Not in common spots; searching..."; Get-ChildItem -Path C:\\ -Filter gcloud.cmd -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue -Depth 6 | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty FullName })

PowerShell($gcloud = "C:\\Users\\USER\\AppData\\Local\\Google\\Cloud SDK\\google-cloud-sdk\\bin\\gcloud.cmd"; & $gcloud projects add-iam-policy-binding project-a27c9cde-2ce6-4d40-9b9 --member="serviceAccount:code-exp@project-a27c9cde-2ce6-4d40-9b9.iam.gserviceaccount.com" --role="roles/bigquery.jobUser" --condition=None --quiet; Write-Host "--- jobUser done ---"; & $gcloud projects add-iam-policy-binding project-a27c9cde-2ce6-4d40-9b9 --member="serviceAccount:code-exp@project-a27c9cde-2ce6-4d40-9b9.iam.gserviceaccount.com" --role="roles/bigquery.dataViewer" --condition=None --quiet; Write-Host "--- dataViewer done ---")

PowerShell($d = "c:\\Users\\USER\\Desktop\\Hackathon\\Authority Dashboard"; if \(Test-Path "$d\\.git"\) { Write-Host "git repo: YES"; git -C $d status -sb; Write-Host "---"; git -C $d log --oneline -1 } else { Write-Host "NO .git folder here — this local folder is not the git repo that Vercel builds from." })

PowerShell($env_path = "c:\\Users\\USER\\Desktop\\Hackathon\\Authority Dashboard\\.env.local"; Get-Content $env_path | ForEach-Object { if \($_ -match '^\([A-Z_]+\)=\(.+\)$'\) { $name = $matches[1]; $val = $matches[2]; if \($val.Length -gt 30\) { "$name = <$\($val.Length\) chars>" } else { "$name = $val" } } else { $_ } })

PowerShell($root = "C:\\Users\\USER\\Desktop\\Hackathon\\BrainHack CARA"; Get-ChildItem $root -Directory | Select-Object Name; Write-Host "---public---"; if \(Test-Path "$root\\public"\) { Get-ChildItem "$root\\public" | Select-Object Name })

PowerShell($procs = Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($procs\) { $procs | Select-Object Id, ProcessName, @{N='CPU\(s\)';E={[math]::Round\($_.CPU,1\)}}, @{N='MemMB';E={[math]::Round\($_.WorkingSet64/1MB,0\)}} | Format-Table -AutoSize; $procs | Stop-Process -Force; Write-Output "Killed $\($procs.Count\) node process\(es\)." } else { Write-Output "No node processes running." }; if \(Test-Path ".next\\dev\\lock"\) { Remove-Item ".next\\dev\\lock" -Force; Write-Output "Removed stale .next\\dev\\lock" })
